programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Drone'T Knock It 'Til You Try It: A ranching job in Texas inspires Cody to try and modernize their business with the help of technology, but Booger and Bubba are hesitant that it will be successful. Booger visits Matthew's school during parent's week to teach his classmates about cowboying. Bubba struggles with being away from his family for work and feels the pressure to keep their business close to home. A life-changing opportunity for Booger to compete at a world-renowned colt-starting competition leaves Cody and Bubba excited for their friend, but nervous about what it will mean for their business.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Texas Fence-Cutting War: When homesteaders keep cutting down her fences to access grazing land and water, a widowed landowner teams up with famed Texas Ranger Ira Aten to protect her property. Aten hopes his explosive plan of action will force the cutters to compromise.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Battle Beneath the Mountain: For months, a thin wall of rock is all that keeps the peace between two rival silver mining companies 300 feet below the Idaho desert. When the barrier is finally breached, pickaxes give way to pistols and rifles, and the miners battle for five days.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Grit on the Open Range: The cowboys compete in a talent show to earn immunity. The teams take on wild colts in the elimination challenge and two cowboys go home.

programme.title: The Warrant: Breaker's Law
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal John Breaker and his deputy ride to a town held hostage by a ruthless gang as they transport a prisoner through the West. With the fate of a community at stake, they must decide if they will abandon the town or make a stand for justice.

programme.title: Heritage Falls
programme.desc: Three generations of totally opposite men go on a weekend 'retreat' at Heritage Falls and, in the process, are forced to get over their longstanding differences.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Torches, Stained Glass, Wind Chimes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Jill starts in Hilo, Hawaii where she meets Leilehua Yuen, a metal torch maker. Leilehua shows Jill the techniques she learned from her father that she continues to use today. In Denver, Colorado, Jill meets Phil Watkins, a traditional stained glass creator that is carrying on a centuries old family artistry. Finally, in Austin, Texas, she visits Davis and Franz Blanchard, a father and son team who create a special wind chime for Jill with a decidedly Texas melody.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Illinois: Did you know ice cream sundae was given its name in Evanston, Illinois? Well, this week, singer and entertainer Taylor Hicks enjoys a few scoops of the creamy confection as he tastes his way across Illinois looking to discover the state's most emblematic foods. Come along as he visits the cornfields that produce the official state snack: popcorn. He also learns how to bake the perfect bread for the famous Italian beef sandwich, and he heads to the windy city to get the low down on deep-dish pizza and the Chicago-style hot dog. To top it all off, Taylor visits the birthplace of the ice cream sundae. It's a plateful of Illinois cuisine filled with the stories and legends behind the state's tastiest foods.

programme.title: Turquoise Fever
programme.desc: Turquoise Fever - Mo' Money, Mo' Problems: While prospecting for a new turquoise mine, the Ottesons discover an abundance of variscite, a gemstone that has recently grown in popularity. The family quickly gets to work to open their first variscite claim. The news of their promising discovery reaches Trenton when he's home with JaKell during the last days of her complicated pregnancy. With Trenton excited and anxious, JaKell assures him she will be fine if he goes out for the day to check out the new claim. For all their help and hard work, Donna and Danny give Tristan and Lane control of their very first mine. Eager to get started, the brothers set up their first dynamite blast, but due to their inexperience, the results are disappointing. Tony and Emily celebrate their tenth wedding anniversary in true Otteson fashion, searching for riches on their new claim.

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli
programme.sub-title: My World With Mike Iaconelli - "Kyle Troup, Pro Bowler
programme.desc: With Hurricane Elsa fast approaching off the Jersey shore, Kyle Troup, the 2021 Pro Bowling Players Championship winner, and Ike switch it up and set out on a saltwater, multi-species challenge in an attempt to beat the storm. The popular two-handed bowler with the big personality and bigger hair is a fishing newby. With a storm approaching, can the two get it done and complete the challenge? Day two is spent in Kyle's territory, the bowling alley. Can Ike throw the bowling ball like he can cast a line?

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli
programme.sub-title: My World With Mike Iaconelli - "Jim Miller, UFC Fighter

Will Ike remember the moves or run screaming from the fight? With an amazing fishery nearby, the two brave the wild to explore what was once one of Ike's favorite childhood fishing holes...does it live up to his memory or do they leave empty handed?

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli
programme.sub-title: My World With Mike Iaconelli - "Keyshawn Whitehorse, Pro Bull Rider
programme.desc: Keyshawn Whitehorse, professional bull rider ranked 8th in the PBR world circuit teaches Ike the ropes in a quick training session before mounting a bull at the Cowtown Rodeo in Southern NJ. Does Ike have what it takes to last the eight seconds, or will he be fishing from a seated position the rest of his life? Day two is spent fishing a multi species challenge at a local lake. Does Keyshawn's trout fishing experience give him a leg up in succeeding at this challenge?

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry gets an unsettling message from her friend Caramel Corn, who owns a quaint little farm out in the Strawberryland countryside. Things aren't going so well for Caramel Corn: her farm animals seem to be running away.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.sub-title: Sing Along to Your Favourite Songs
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids.

programme.title: Meekah
programme.desc: Meekah and her best friend Blippi have exciting and educational adventures together.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: There is so much to learn about, it will make you want to shout ‘BLIPPI'!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum
programme.desc: Join Mia, Twinkle the Star and Baby Max for some of your favourite nursery rhymes!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum
programme.desc: Join Mia, Twinkle the Star and Baby Max for some of your favourite nursery rhymes!

programme.title: Gecko's Garage
programme.desc: Gecko's Garage is a repair shop that cares! Run by cheerful mechanic Gecko, his trusty robot sidekicks.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Green Ninja
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd - but realize they have to work together in their attempt to rescue Lloyd from the snakes inside the unstable Fire Temple that is built on a volcano.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Steps Of Faith
programme.desc: Steps of Faith is a light-heart dramedy about Faith Houston an accountant, who is directed by God to move to a small town to work on a Hippotherapy farm helping children. Faith is mocked by her family since she doesn't have a rapport with children or animals and is not a devout Christian. Faith decides to follow her heart and move after she encounters several challenges. She finds herself at the farm in the horse stalls shoveling manure. Faith cracks under pressure and leaves after a child is almost injured questioning whether she heard God's voice or not.

programme.title: Monkey King: Hero is Back
programme.desc: Out of his imprisonment, the all-powerful Monkey will need to save an innocent village from the evil Mountain Lord and his monstrous army.

programme.title: Blippi and The Holiday Snow Globe
programme.desc: Join Blippi and Meekah as they learn all about festive seasons for different people around the world! Learn about Christmas and decorate a tree with Santa, Learn about Kwanzaa with Baba The Storyteller and Hanukkah at The Westside Jewish Community Center!

programme.title: Berry Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest they are entering.

programme.title: Berry Bitty Adventurer
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Foods that are Super Powerful
programme.desc: Avery makes a power-packed dinner with Chef Robert Bartley who makes meals for Toronto's top sports teams. Lily stops at the Healthy Butcher for super-charged chicken and veggie sausages. Things heat up in the kitchen for the big chilli cook-off.

programme.title: Foods that are Wrapped
programme.desc: Can a meal be wrapped like a present? Lily finds out with Chef John Klianis when they prepare Spanakotiropita. Avery makes authentic Mexican tacos at La Tortilleria. Together with Matt, they wrap things up with meals in a package, or “En Papillotte” as the French say.

programme.title: A Surprise Visit, Stolen Treasure, A Flower For Olive
programme.desc: EP16: When Tijinou and Tijibelle lands on Lil'Pirate's beach, Lil'Pirate announces to them a huge surprise: the visit of Anoki the Inuit! EP17: Lil'Pirate takes big steps on the beach, including when Tijinou and Tijibelle arrive. And three steps towards the North! Then two steps towards the East! Then ten steps due South! Lil'Pirate arrives at the foot of the rock. One-thousand sardines! His treasure is there! He's sure of it! EP18: When Tijinou and Tijibelle arrive in the area surrounding the lighthouse, they notice Pauline the Octopus on the rocks, the 5 tentacles clinging to the ground, like stumps, and the body tense like a tent…

programme.title: Percival's Island, Bracelet for Olive, The Princess's Crown
programme.desc: EP19: When Tijinou and Tijibelle land on Lil'Pirate's beach, Lil'Pirate leads them to his favorite hideout: shhhh! He has a secret! He looks all around him, there's no one! He takes out a map! It's the map to go on a fabulous and magical island...EP20: For the birthday of Pauline the Octopus, Edmond wants to offer her a bracelet made of shells.EP21: The princess has broken a little part of her crown. Tijinou and Tijibelle will have to find the clown with the glue to repair it.

programme.title: Blippi Visits Rhythm Discovery Center
programme.desc: Make music with Blippi in this episode on percussion.

programme.title: High Tech Drama
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show
programme.sub-title: Kids Diana Show | Princess of Play!
programme.desc: Kid video superstar, Diana, and her brother, Roma, take you along on all their pretend play adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Fizzy's Lunch Lab
programme.desc: Professor Fizzy prepares food and teaches about nutrition, diet and physical activity.

programme.title: Charlie Freaks Out
programme.desc: CHARLIE FREAKS OUT is about Charlie, who is TOTALLY freaking out about those things she's crazy about! Like Rey from Star Wars, The Rubik's Cube, Minecraft, and even BROCCOLI!

programme.title: Satisfying Video
programme.desc: Here you will find videos of finger family nursery rhymes, Play Doh, Kinetic Sand, Toys

programme.title: Akili and Me
programme.desc: Akili and friends accidentally spill all of Mother Frog's food! Now they must learn a new word: Cook! And help Mother Frog to cook all the food for the frog feast!

programme.title: Problem Solved
programme.desc: Hey! You in the back! Losing participation points because you're teacher can't see you? Don't worry, Jeremy can, and he has the perfect solution!

programme.title: Wow, I Never Knew That!
programme.desc: A whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed with exciting tidbits and fascinating facts that uncover the truths and origins behind the stuff you're already familiar with.

programme.title: The Shadownsters
programme.desc: Solomon and Gretta are ready to get some sleep. When their father switches off the light, Gretta falls asleep and Solomon, very scared, tries to hide under the sheets. Suddenly, he hears a weird noise. Solomon is frightened and calls Pancho, his reliable plush, who comes to life and helps him to discover a terrible monster, a Shadownster.

programme.title: KIDZ BOP Kids
programme.desc: KIDZ BOP, the #1 Music Brand for Kids

programme.title: Bubble Bip
programme.desc: The hilarious adventures of Bubble Bip, a video game hero who slings bubbles at sassy squids, and the zany group of Earth kids he makes friends with.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: Paula and Friends lack eggs to bake their cake. They look for Mr. Farmer for eggs. They helped Mr. Framer on his farm and Tim caused an accident. Will they be able to successfully make their cake?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane: The Story of Doris the Duck
programme.desc: What starts off as a game of make believe takes a twist when Princess Doris of the Zambam goes too far, that is until her chums Toby and Kevin teach her a lesson.

programme.title: Lellobee City Farm: Caterpillar Butterfly song / Yoga / Fruity Ice Cream Song / Five Little Ducks
programme.desc: Ella is enjoying watching a caterpillar eating an apple on a tree but after she returns with a flower for it to nibble, she discovers her little friend has gone! Bee points to the cocoon hanging from a leaf. Ella and Bee watch in wonder as the cocoon opens and a beautiful butterfly emerges! / In this mindful video, Rishi's Mum holds a yoga class at the farm. She teaches three positions to Ella, Rishi, Pablo and Lettie. They learn the Downward Facing Dog, Warrior Three and The Butterfly. The students are all naturals - well, all except Lettie. It appears sheep are not very good at yoga! / It's a hot day so Woolly Sheep sets up an ice cream stall outside Lellobee City Farm. Ella, Rishi, Lettie and Carlos bring Woolly fresh apples, oranges, bananas and cherries from the farm so Woolly can make them delicious and refreshing fruity ice cream. / Ella, Mama Duck and the five little ducklings are having a game of Hide and Seek. The ducklings hide all around the farm - on Heidi's hat, in the vegetable patch, on a hay bail, on Carlo's guitar and among some flowers. Will Ella and Mama Duck be able to find them?

programme.title: Magic Mixies: Mixlings: The Highest Tower / Magicus Mixus!
programme.desc: Sienna and the Mixlings have finally made it to the castle! All that's left is to find the highest tower and get Sienna back home. However, things aren't as straight forward as they first thought. Is the chaotic magic too much to get Sienna home? Or does she find herself having to choose between the Mixlings and going back to reality? / Sienna and the Mixlings find themselves at the epicenter of the chaotic magic! Can Sienna rescue the Mixlings and make it home safely? Or does she need a helping hand from the castle's guardian?Magicus Mixus!

programme.title: Pirata and Capitano: The Light of the Great Ocean
programme.desc: In the middle of the night, the Pink Skulls' crew spots a strange light moving through the water.

programme.title: Danny Go! Dance Songs: The Skeleton Shake / Color Beat Drum-Along Dance! / The Floor is Quicksand: Pyramid Adventure!
programme.desc: Are you ready to SHAKE like a skeleton? Time for a silly, spooky Halloween dance song! Follow along with Danny and his friends as they dance like werewolves, bats, mummies, spiders and more. Then get all your bones rattling and shaking like a dancing skeleton! / Are you ready to drum along to the COLOR BEAT?! Follow the color patterns along with Danny Go and his friends in this rhythm memory game! Then listen closely and use your drumsticks to hit the right balls in the color smashing game! / Are you ready for a wild DESERT adventure?? Dance along with Danny Go as he gallops with camels, tiptoes past traps & swings over snake pits...all in search of the lost treasure of King Pap's pyramid! Oh, but if you see any quicksand, you gotta get off the floor fast!

programme.title: Orange Moo-Cow: Robinson Crusoe Party / A New Tradition
programme.desc: Boh doesn't get invited to Grey's birthday party. Zoh invites him to come just like that, without invitation, but Boh's feelings are already hurt, he has complexes now, so he refuses to go, and Zoh goes along. Boh is not happy feeling lonely, Mommy Cow tells him a story of Robinson, who found himself all alone on an uninhabited island, but didn't get all depressed. Mommy Cow and Boh, following Robinson's example, make a house with whatever they can find, make it as cozy as they can and come up with some sort of entertainment. / Zoh learns that in their family on her Mom's side there's a tradition – everyone used to figure skate. Zoh decides to continue this tradition, but she is just not good at it, and she's bored. Zoh realizes she doesn't really like figure skating, she likes hockey.

programme.title: Blippi Wonders: Planets / Chocolate Factory / Fruit & Vegetables / Kangaroo
programme.desc: Three, two, one, Blast Off! The BlippiMobile becomes a spacecraft on this mission to find out which planets are in the solar system!

programme.title: Elemon: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Leo and his friends visit Professor World to try to learn more about the mysterious Mateo. Just as they start unraveling his dark past, Mateo himself arrives, ready to destroy the lab using a brand-new Elemon named ProBurn!

programme.title: Boing: The Play Ranger: It's a Summer Snow Party!
programme.desc: It's a very hot day in Playville and everyone has used every bit of ice to cool down. With the temperature getting dangerously hot, Playville needs more ice to cool everyone off.

programme.title: Construction Site: Feeling Flat
programme.desc: Scooch would like to find something he can do that Diggs can't.

programme.title: Hip Hop Harry Music Videos: Brush Your Teeth / Share Alike 3D / Head Shoulders Knees & Toes / Old MacDonald / Wheels On The Bus
programme.desc: Enjoy this sing-along all about brushing your teeth and proper mouth hygiene from Hip Hop Harry! Remember to always brush your teeth! / Learn about manners and how to share with this great kids sing-along from Hip Hop Harry! Observe how the kids share in the video and then share with your own friends! / This nursery rhyme will teach you about your body parts and where they are on your body. Sing and dance along with Hip Hop Harry and the kids. The song will speed up slowly, try to keep up! / Hip Hop Harry's Old MacDonald is a classic nursery rhyme sing along for the little ones. This is a great way to learn about farm animals! / Hip Hop Harry's Wheels On The Bus is a great nursery rhyme sing along for the little ones. Not only can you sing along, but you can also dance along to the choreography.

programme.title: Mittens & Pants: Bunny Family Wedding, My Carrots, Puppy Detective
programme.desc: Pants the puppy is adopted. His parents are bunnies. But it is not until Pants the puppy goes to a family wedding, that he realizes every member of his family, but him, is a bunny. When Monsieur LaFleur gets Apricot's help to film a carrot commercial, he worries that he's dropping his carrots too much. Pants is the Puppy Detective, no mystery is too mysterious for his puppy nose! But is his nose suspect number one in why he's not solving the case?

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: A Korean-Canadian family runs a convenience store in Toronto.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Qualified to teach gym class, Gerry Duncan is instead hired in the social studies department of the prestigious Xavier Academy, a private school for kids in grades 5-12. Gerry struggles to stay ahead of his students as he fakes his way through each class, having decided that he knows enough to get by, and he can just improvise everything else. A comedic take on the profession, "Mr. D" shows teaching from a teacher's perspective and reveals the truth: teachers just don't know everything. The series is based on Gerry Dee's life as a high-school teacher before he became a stand-up comic.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Based on an award-winning memoir from Mark Critch, "Son of a Critch" is the hilarious and very real story of a young Mark coming of age in the 1980s. Developed from Critch's 2018 memoir, which was in turn based on his real life experiences growing up in Newfoundland, Canada, the series is a heartfelt window in the life of a child who is much older inside than his 11 years. He uses comedy and self-deprecation to win friends and connect with the small collection of people in his limited junior high world.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: In the sitcom "Schitt's Creek," a wealthy couple -- video store magnate Johnny and his soap opera star wife Moira -- suddenly find themselves completely broke. With only one remaining asset, a small town called Schitt's Creek, which the Roses bought years earlier as a joke, this once-wealthy couple must give up life as they know it. With their two spoiled children in tow and their pampered lives behind them, the Rose family is forced to face their newfound poverty head-on and come together as a family to survive.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Warm, loyal PR executive Kate and her longtime friend, no-nonsense psychiatrist Anne, attend a judgmental mommies' group, where they meet timid IT tech Jenny and blindly optimistic real estate agent Frankie. The four quickly form an unlikely friendship, sharing struggles of urban motherhood filled with the chaos of toddlers, tantrums, careers, and identity crises, all while trying to achieve the holy grail: a sense of self. The ensemble comedy is largely drawn from the personal experiences of star/co-creator Catherine Reitman ("Blackish," "It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia").

programme.title: Home Disaster Zone

programme.title: Michael Joiner
programme.desc: Michaelís brand of comedy is, in a word, familiar. Not in the sense that youíve heard it before, but more so that he knows you and you know him. He speaks about the things you are thinking in a way that sounds so much like your inner voice it is astounding. His effortless delivery will resonate with you. Michael is the 1st Place winner of the Hollywood Improv's "FUNNIEST COMIC IN L.A." 2008, and 2010 Christian Music Hall of Fame "COMEDIAN OF THE YEAR" nominee, Joiner has attracted wide praise for his routines that blend a sarcastic edginess with a devotion to clean humor. Joiner has headlined at The LA AREA Improvs, The Funny Bone, The Ice House and other comedy clubs across the country while also performing at colleges and sold out Clean Comedy Concerts nationwide. He's also written for "The Tonight Show With Jay Leno." He has been performing nationwide for over 25 years and is rated one of the nation's funniest Clean Stand-up Comedians. The TV Guide Network calls Michael "One of the funniest, most original, stand up Comedians working today!" In 2006, Michael was one out of only four Comedians chosen worldwide to star in the top selling DVD, "The Clean Stand Up Comedy Tour." Unlike many Comedians who stick to their rehearsed script, Michael's stand up comedy show includes some of the most clever, hilarious improv and audience interaction you will ever experience.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Shayne Smith delivers more stories about everything from a failed robbery to a wrestling match in the New York Subway and even saving the life of a dog in his second original Dry Bar Comedy special, “Alligator Boys."

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: One Wife, Two Daughters, and Zero Influence
programme.desc: Mark stands 6'7" weighs in at 350 technically a giant however he is very weak and a wimp. In his routines, he weaves the story of his life as a bumbling jolly giant in his fast engaging storytelling style. He has been compared to Louie Anderson. Mark is a true road dog, performing in 40 states and all across Canada. Mark's ultimate dream is to do a film that people actually will have seen.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Spencer King: Stay At Home Sad
programme.desc: Spencer is a husband, new father, and cat owner. Join Spencer as he takes you on a trip through the mind of an insecure, but good-hearted funny man. His act contains a little something for everyone. Not only will you laugh, but you might also learn to appreciate the positive things in your own life.

programme.title: Robert Mac
programme.desc: Robert's award-winning comedy is smart, subtle, and silly. Not too smart and not too subtle, but occasionally a bit more silly than youíd expect. And always clean. Robert is a regular at some of the finest comedy clubs around the country. Winner of "Comedy Centralís Laugh Riots." Finalist at "Billy Crystalís Mr. Saturday Night Contest", "San Francisco International Comedy Competition", "Boston Comedy Festival", "Jerry Lewis MDA Telethon Talent Search."

programme.title: James Johann
programme.desc: James' childhood upbringing was significantly influenced by country music, countless bad hair cuts, and Catholic school. In 1991, James began his stand-up career in Kansas City. Today, James is a long-time veteran of the stand-up comedy circuit, performing at clubs across the country. His self-deprecating sense of humor and high energy style come together to create a unique onstage persona. James relies more on his brain than the profane and his comedy is a truthful and hilarious reflection of life as he sees it.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Often called the "hardest working man in show-business", Steve Hofstetter covers everything from paper decapitations in plane crashes to seeing-eye children.

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: You Can Tell 'Em I Said It
programme.desc: Eddie Griffin proves once more that he's one of the world's premiere comedic talents in this stand-up special You Can Tell ‘Em I Said It.

programme.title: Tom Segura: Completely Normal
programme.desc: Tom Segura share a few off-hand appraisals on hotels and hobbies with a cool and thoughtful demeanor in this one-hour comedy special.

programme.title: Earthquake: (Practice) The Secret Files of Earthquake (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Earthquake brings his straightforward signature style to his all-new stand-up special you won't want to miss.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan Noble Ape
programme.desc: In his 6th special, Jim uses humor to deal with the unthinkable & proves that laughter is the best medicineor is it?

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Quality Time
programme.desc: Comedian Jim Gaffigan performs live at the State Theatre in Minneapolis, MN.

programme.title: Jeff Allen: Honor Thy Wife
programme.desc: Jeff Allen's Dry Bar Comedy videos have amassed millions of views on social media and other platforms.

programme.title: The Runner
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the 2010 BP oil spill, an flawed politician is forced to confront his dysfunctional life.

programme.title: Buster's Mal Heart
programme.desc: In this bold thriller spiked with dark humor, Rami Malek is a family man whose chance encounter with a conspiracy-obsessed drifter leaves him on the run from the police and an impending event known as The Inversion.

programme.title: My Friend Dahmer
programme.desc: Disney's Ross Lynch stars as the awkward, adolescent Jeffrey Dahmer - before he became one of America's most infamous serial killers

programme.title: Back Roads
programme.desc: A young man cares for his younger sisters after their mother is imprisoned for murdering their abusive father. When he strikes up an affair with a married woman, long-dormant family secrets bubble to the surface in this noir thriller.

programme.title: Shark Week
programme.desc: A group of complete strangers find themselves isolated by a wealthy madman on his island compound. They are forced into a horrifying gauntlet where they must survive a barrage of ever deadlier species of shark.

programme.title: Airplane VS Volcano
programme.desc: When a commercial airliner is trapped within a ring of erupting volcanoes, the passengers and crew must find a way to survive - without landing.

programme.title: Day the Earth Stopped, The
programme.desc: Hundreds of massive intergalactic robots appear in all of the major world capitals with an ultimatum: Prove the value of human civilization or be destroyed.

programme.title: 8213: Gacy House
programme.desc: A group of paranormal investigators enter the home of serial killer John Gacy, hoping to find evidence of paranormal activity. As the evening progresses it seems the investigators are not prepared for the horror still within the house.

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: A Transsiberian train journey to Moscow becomes a thrilling chase of deception and murder.

programme.title: Police Story: Lockdown
programme.desc: While visiting his estranged daughter at a nightclub, a police captain (martial arts legend Jackie Chan) must spring into action when an elaborate kidnapping plan unravels right before his eyes. Subtitled.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: When a gamer accidentally opens a portal into a side-scroller, she becomes trapped in a notorious intergalactic prison. To escape, she must finish the game with help from her not-so-savvy friend on the outside...or remain a 16-bit character forever.

programme.title: American Yakuza 2: Back to Back
programme.desc: After an ex-cop (Michael Rooker, "Guardians of the Galaxy") finds himself caught up in a battle between Japanese mobsters and local thugs, he discovers that he was framed by a corrupt cop.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: The Madeleine McCann Case
programme.desc: Only three years of age a young girl was taken from her bed with no clue left behind.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Dennis Nilsen
programme.desc: Dennis Andrew Nilsen was a Scottish serial killer and necrophile who murdered at least twelve young men and boys between 1978 and 1983 in London.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: This documentary explores the lives of three different women who have been killed walking home.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: In 1945, the world was ushered into the atomic age. With his role as the Father of the Bomb solidified, Oppenheimer became increasingly worried about the potential danger that scientific inventions could pose to humanity.

programme.title: Chicago 10
programme.desc: Archival footage, animation, and music are used to look back at the eight anti-war protesters who were put on trial following the 1968 Democratic National Convention.

programme.title: Simchas and Sorrows
programme.desc: A free-spirited artist must come to terms with religion in order to marry the love of her life.

programme.title: Because We're Done
programme.desc: A married man going thru a mid life crisis believes that the fate of his marriage rest solely in his hands. Only to learn that the ultimate decision will be made by his wife.

programme.title: Florrie
programme.desc: Florrie is dating 3 men. Juggling these men is catching up with her as is her complicated past. Her best friend Henrietta demands she picks just one of the committed boyfriends. Why is Florrie not able to accept love from any of these men?

programme.title: Tony Bennett
programme.desc: Duets II: The Great Performances is a visually stunning video companion to Tony Bennett's history-making #1 album, Duets II. The concert features the full song performances from Tony and today's greatest artists as they were recorded live in the studio. The musical segments are enhanced by insights on the process from Tony and the duet partners, providing an inside look at this landmark album in an unprecedented career. Duets II: The Great Performances is a testament to the artistry and dedication of Tony Bennett, beloved by the performers who sing with him and audiences around the world. Starring Andrea Bocelli, Michael Bublé, Natalie Cole, Sheryl Crow, Aretha Franklin, Josh Groban, Faith Hill, Norah Jones, Lady Gaga, kd lang, John Mayer, Willie Nelson, Alejandro Sanz, Queen Latifah, Carrie Underwood, Amy Winehouse.

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

Try platform co-ops instead | Trebor Scholz 5) Why do airlines sell too many tickets? - Nina Klietsch

programme.title: Lead the Way

programme.title: Best of the Best

programme.title: Secrets of the Wild
programme.desc: Be inspired to go out and rediscover the wonders of the natural world -- and get a deeper understanding of where (and why) the wild things grow. 1) How humans and animals can live together | Jane Goodall 2) The secret sex lives of pandas | Lucy Cooke 3) Why do animals have such different lifespans? - Joao Pedro de Magalhaes 4) How life on Earth adapts to you and me | Shane Campbell-Staton 5) Would you raise the baby that ate your siblings? | Francesca Barbero

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) How do you know what's true? | Sheila Marie Orfano 2) The link between inequality and anxiety | Richard Wilkinson 3) How climate change affects your mental health | Britt Wray 4) When do kids start to care about other people's opinions? | Sara Valencia Botto 5) Should you trust unanimous decisions? - Derek Abbott 6) Why our screens make us less happy | Adam Alter 7) 3 lessons on decision-making from a poker champion | Liv Boeree
